summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Intercultura Asistente Virtual language learning platform. All core features working perfectly including navigation, 5 language cards, 6 levels per language, lessons with audio, interactive flashcards, and quizzes. Successfully tested Spanish A1 and English A1 complete flows.
passed_tests: Home page loads with 5 language cards (Spanish, English, French, German, Portuguese)
Navigation links work: Inicio, Idiomas, individual language links
Language cards navigation to language-specific pages
Language pages display all 6 levels (A1-C2) with content counts
'Ver todo el contenido' buttons navigate to level pages
Level pages contain 3 functional tabs: Lecciones, Flashcards, Quiz
Lessons tab displays vocabulary with audio buttons (48 found in Spanish A1)
Audio buttons functional with browser TTS fallback
Grammar sections properly formatted and displayed
Flashcard action buttons ('Estudiar de nuevo', 'Lo sé') working
Quiz functionality: start quiz, answer questions, progress tracking
Spanish A1 complete flow: 6 lessons, 10 flashcards, 10 quiz questions
English A1 complete flow: 2 lessons, 6 flashcards, 5 quiz questions
Footer displays correctly with language links and company info
Mobile navigation menu opens and displays all links
All sections present: hero, languages, levels, features
